data.title: Rep. Maxine Waters Lambasts Trump’s CZ Pardon In Scathing Statement
data.description:

Congresswoman Blasts Donald Trump Over Crypto ClemencyIn a Thursday statement, Waters slammed the Trump administration’s decision as a way to “effectively legitimize the crypto crime CZ was convicted of” and […]

data.title: Former Fed chairs Bernanke and Yellen urge Supreme Court to overturn Trump’s global tariffs
data.description:
Former Federal Reserve bosses Ben Bernanke and Janet Yellen just told the Supreme Court to throw out most of Trump’s global tariffs. And they didn’t hold back. In a sharp, 600-word amicus brief filed last Friday, they called the tariffs economically meaningless and legally baseless. They were joined by nearly 50 other economists who spanned […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bernanke-yellen-scotus-trump-tariffs/

data.title: Crypto Biz: Bitcoin whales trade keys for comfort

data.title: Trump selects crypto-savvy Michael Selig for CFTC chair role, appeasing the Winklevosses
data.description:
President Donald Trump has chosen Michael Selig to head the CFTC, replacing his earlier pick Brian Quintenz, whose nomination collapsed under pressure from Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss, owners of crypto platform Gemini. Selig, who currently serves as chief counsel for the SEC’s crypto task force, has spent recent years working alongside SEC Chairman Paul Atkins, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-picks-michael-selig-for-cftc-chair/

data.title: Payment processor Zelle taps stablecoins for cross-border payments
data.description:
Zelle will use stablecoins for faster cross-border money transfers. The recently passed GENIUS Act in the US gives clear rules, fueling Zelle’s global innovation push. Major US banks are backing Zelle’s blockchain-based cross-border network
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/payment-processor-zelle-taps-stablecoins-for-cross-border-payments/

data.title: US seeks to seize crypto assets of Russian BTC-e exchange
data.description:
U. S. authorities have filed a motion aiming to take hold of the coins held in the wallets of the once-largest Russian cryptocurrency exchange, BTC-e. America’s justice department hopes to forfeit the digital money of the trading platform, which processed funds originating from all sorts of criminal activities. DOJ wants BTC-e’s cryptocurrency The U. S. Department of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-seeks-to-seize-crypto-assets-of-russian-btc-e-exchange/
